feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Application Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Application Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Selecting a control from different pages using a rule on a Tab page - SAP MDK
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I have a tab page that has two tabs and each tab points to different pages where each page has its own controls

From the toolBar button I activate a Rule where I want to obtain the elements of each page that has the tab.

This has my rule but it doesn't work for me

entry.title: How Extend and keep the validation the standard fiori Manage purchase Orders app in SAP BAS?
entry.content:
My requirement is to add company code and material as mandatory fields in the Manage purchase order standard fiori app in SAP BAS. If user clicks on "GO" button without any input needs to validate.

I have created adaptation project from BAS and imported the standard app from ABAP repository and opened in Adaptation view.

May i know which option i need to use to keep the validation ?

Please find the attached screenshot and help me.

Thanks

entry.title: How to update Purchase Order Delivery Status to Finished using web service in SAP ByDesign?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

How to update Purchase Order Delivery Status to Finished using web service in SAP ByDesign? Even if the inbound delivery receiving is partially delivered only. I want to automate the Finish button in PO using web service.

 

Regards,

Carlo

entry.title: [ Unable to find service undefined ] SAP Business Application Studio does't connect to Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
I have been creating views in Hana Studio for years and now I want to configure BTP Trial to see how to do this using SAP Business Application Studio.

When I try do Add Data Source in Projection:

There's a message:

Unable to find service undefined

I'm tryng to connect the SAP Business Application Studio with the Cloud Foundry, but when I click, the option does not open to the input required fields:

  • Select Cloud Foundry Organization
  • Select Cloud Foundry Space 

Does anyone know how to make this connection between SAP Business Application Studio and the Cloud Foundry Trial base?

entry.title: Problem to connect Business Application Studio to S/4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
I have done a RAP Application (and apparently, it's necessary to go throw BAS to end the Building of the App for the deployment and the end of the process).
I try to connect my system to Business application studio in order to deploy a Rap application to S/4 Public Cloud (and not BTP)

I was following the tutorial Connect SAP Business Application Studio and SAP S/4HANA Cloud System | SAP Tutorials

And in the step 4, I have an error Certificate cannot be saved in Address Book.

I check my roles in Development environment.
We are in 3 system landscape.

Christophe

entry.title: how to connect to Postgresql (backing service) database from SAP BAS sqlTools (PostGres)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I enabled Postgresql hyperscapler instance and created service key.  I would like to connect to this instance from SAP BAS with SQL tools option.  But I am unable to connect to this instance.  Can you help.

Thanks 

Ravi

entry.title: Run NodeJS app locally using destination and connectivity services
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

lately I have been trying to create a NodeJS app using NestJS and the SAP Cloud SDK for javascript and deploy it to the cloud foundry runtime according to this example: https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-sdk-js?tab=readme-ov-file

I created a new service, generated the odata client using an edmx file of our on premise service and deployed it. 

The deployed version is fine: I can read data and consume the odata service. 
In local mode the destination fails. 

I found this blogpost telling me how to check the connectivity of my destination. 
Using the curl request results in this:

 

curl -v -i "<destinationName>.dest/sap/opu/odata/iwfnd/catalogservice;v=2/ServiceCollection?%24top=1"
* Uses proxy env variable no_proxy == 'localhost,127.0.0.1,github.com,.github.com,.npmjs.org,.yarnpkg.com,npm.sap.com,.maven.apache.org,.repo-cache.svc.cluster.local'
* Uses proxy env variable http_proxy == 'http://127.0.0.1:8887'
*   Trying 127.0.0.1:8887...
* Connected to 127.0.0.1 (127.0.0.1) port 8887 (#0)
> GET http://<destinationName>.dest/sap/opu/odata/iwfnd/catalogservice;v=2/ServiceCollection?%24top=1 HTTP/1.1
> Host: sd_orca_sap_ecc_akab.dest
> User-Agent: curl/7.88.1
> Accept: */*
> Proxy-Connection: Keep-Alive
> 
< HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error
HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error
< Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8
< X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
< Date: Thu, 16 Jan 2025 17:10:28 GMT
Date: Thu, 16 Jan 2025 17:10:28 GMT
< Content-Length: 75
Content-Length: 75

< 
dial tcp: lookup <destinationName>.dest on 100.64.0.10:53: no such host
* Connection #0 to host 127.0.0.1 left intact

 

I also created a .env file that should change the proxy settings:

destinations="[{"name": "<destinationName>","url": "http://<destinationName>.dest","proxyConfiguration":{"host": "127.0.0.1","port": 8887,"protocol":"http"}}]"

 

My destination looks like this:

The destination is created on subaccount level. 
After changing the destination i also called the reload request Andre mentioned in his blogpost.

My default-env.json and default-services.json files both contain the configuration to the destination, connectivity and xsuaa service I created for the app. The variables are created using the cf env myapp > .env command. 
I am quite sure the service is found. Removing the destination service from these files results in another error: "Could not find service binding of type 'destination'".

 

At this point I am very desperate in trying to start my app locally. 

Any help is appreciated, thank you already in advance!

entry.title: Fiori Standard App Extensions
entry.content:
Hi,

Does anyone know how the FIORI extension projects are linked back to get their main app ?

And is there such linkage needed to preview the extension projects using live data on BAS ?

Many thanks.

entry.title: Not able to connect to system while creating a project from SAP BAS
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to create a new project template --> SAP Fiori generator--> Custom page which use the fiori elements.

when i try to connect to a system to get the odata services getting the below error.

 

When i check the same destination using my id in BTP the connection is successufl.

 

Please suggest what else i need to check ?

entry.title: How can I call a destination subaccount via CAP
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to link a sub-account destination via CAP. Using the xs-app.json file, the file cannot find the destination, returning a 404 not found:

Console:

Destination:

xs-app.json

I have read that you cannot use xs-app.json in a CAP application, so I wanted to know if there is another method to call a sub-account destination.

Thank you,
regards.

Emanuele

entry.title: Pricing in SAP Business Application Studio Standard Plan
entry.content:
I would like to know the pricing of SAP Business Application Studio Standard Plan.
EUR 28.00 per month means for one user who access/use the BAS . What is the Billing Block Size mean?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Pricing in SAP Business Application Studio Standard Plan
entry.content:
I would like to know the pricing of SAP Business Application Studio Standard Plan.
EUR 28.00 per month means for one user who access/use the BAS . What is the Billing Block Size mean?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Perú, detracciones
entry.content:
Buenos días,

Estamos configurando la factura electrónica para Perú en la versión ECC y no sabemos la clave de cuenta a la que hay que asignar la condición de detracción.

Agradecería muchisimo si alguién nos pudiera ayudar con esto.

Muchas gracias

saludos 

Ana

entry.title: Destination usage in SAP BAS.
entry.content:
Hello!
I am trying to make a connection to a destination via SAP BAS app, that's a SAP FSM extension. Currently I can't trigger my destinations URL.
My destination:

This is my xs-app.json:

 

 

{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/equipmentUpdate/?(.*)",
      "target": "/$1",
      "destination": "EquipmentUpdate",
      "authenticationType": "none"
    },
    {
        "source": "^/resources/(.*)$",
        "target": "/resources/$1",
        "authenticationType": "none",
        "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
        "source": "^/test-resources/(.*)$",
        "target": "/test-resources/$1",
        "authenticationType": "none",
        "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
        "source": "^(.*)$",
        "target": "$1",
        "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
        "authenticationType": "none"
    }
  ]
}

 

 

My mta.yaml:

 

 

_schema-version: "3.2"
ID: equipment1
version: 0.0.1
modules:
- name: equipment1-destination-content
  type: com.sap.application.content
  requires:
  - name: equipment1-destination-service
    parameters:
      content-target: true
  - name: equipment1-repo-host
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: equipment1-repo-host-key
  - name: equipment1-uaa
    parameters:
      service-key:
        name: equipment1-uaa-key
  parameters:
    content:
      instance:
        destinations:
        - Name: equipment1_html_repo_host
          ServiceInstanceName: equipment1-html5-service
          ServiceKeyName: equipment1-repo-host-key
          sap.cloud.service: equipment1
        existing_destinations_policy: update
  build-parameters:
    no-source: true
- name: equipment1-app-content
  type: com.sap.application.content
  path: .
  requires:
  - name: equipment1-repo-host
    parameters:
      content-target: true
  build-parameters:
    build-result: resources
    requires:
    - artifacts:
      - equipment1.zip
      name: equipment1
      target-path: resources/
- name: equipment1
  type: html5
  path: .
  build-parameters:
    build-result: dist
    builder: custom
    commands:
    - npm install
    - npm run build:cf
    supported-platforms: []
resources:
- name: equipment1-destination-service
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    config:
      HTML5Runtime_enabled: true
      version: 1.0.0
    service: destination
    service-name: equipment1-destination-service
    service-plan: lite
- name: equipment1-uaa
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    path: ./xs-security.json
    service: xsuaa
    service-name: equipment1-xsuaa-service
    service-plan: application
- name: equipment1-repo-host
  type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
  parameters:
    service: html5-apps-repo
    service-name: equipment1-html5-service
    service-plan: app-host
parameters:
  deploy_mode: html5-repo
  enable-parallel-deployments: true

 

 

My controllers function for destination call:

 

 

const response = await jQuery.ajax({
                    method: "GET",
                    url: "equipmentUpdate/http/equipment/DEV", 
                    headers: {
                        'Accept': '*/*'
                    }
                });

 

 

I get this response in browser console:

Maybe there is something that is missing or is incorrect?

I tried a bunch of things from blogs and videos but don't know what to do next. It looks like it's getting close to my integration flow but still far enough. 

Thanks! 

Regards,

Ervins

entry.title: Data Source and Service Selection Slowness BTP Trial Account
entry.content: Data Source and Service Selection runs very slow and it takes almost 5 to 10 minutes to loaD the service during initial app creation . Could you please help to reduce slowness

entry.title: Unable to preview the Fiori application in sap bas throwing Self signed certificate error.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to create a application using smart filterbar and smart table where i am trying to map the odataservice.

When i try to preview / check locally from the BAS the metadata is not getting loaded and throwing 500 Internal server error. When i checked the logs its throwing the below error.

Please help me on this...

entry.title: Dynamic Column Headers for Parent and Child Rows in sap.ui.table.TreeTable
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am working with sap.ui.table.TreeTable in SAP UI5 and need to display hierarchical data where parent rows and child rows have different column headers.

Does SAP UI5 officially support different column headers for parent and child nodes in TreeTable?
If not, is there an alternative approach within SAP’s recommended best practices?


Thank you!

Regards,

Preeti

entry.title: FIORI Elements: Missing UI Message from Backend
entry.content:
Hi, 

i have created FIORI Elements App with BOPF as Backend. 

I implemented custom Actions, but triggered Error Messages from Backend are not displayed in FIORI but are visible in Network Console.

Backend Implementation:

 

  METHOD /bobf/if_frw_action~execute.

    DATA: usr_scenario_table TYPE Zt_pmc_usr_scen_ass.
    io_read->retrieve(
      EXPORTING
        iv_node                 = is_ctx-node_key
        it_key                  = it_key
      IMPORTING
        et_data                 = usr_scenario_table
    ).
    DATA(line) = usr_scenario_table[ 1 ].

    DATA: ls_message TYPE symsg.

    MESSAGE e000(ZPM_MO_US_MG) INTO DATA(lv_msg).
    MOVE-CORRESPONDING sy TO ls_message.

    ls_message-msgv1 = 'Errror in App'.

    IF eo_message IS NOT BOUND.
      eo_message = /bobf/cl_frw_factory=>get_message( ).
    ENDIF.

    eo_message->add_message(
      EXPORTING
        is_msg       = ls_message
        iv_node      = is_ctx-node_key
        iv_key       = it_key[ 1 ]-key
    ).

    APPEND VALUE #( key = it_key[ 1 ]-key ) TO et_failed_key.

  ENDMETHOD.

 

According to this UI5 Documentation there are two possible solutions for that:

  • Make Message Persistent
  • Defer read Operation after POST 

Topic 1: I have no idea how to make this message persistent, there is no parameter in the Message Object for that

Topic 2: I have set Attribute refreshAfterChange already to false in manifest.json file in BAS, Errors are still not displayed

 

Another User did have a similar Problem described here and solved it by addressing Importing Parameter "iv_message_target" to '/#TRANSIENT#'. But he did use another Message Container and probably had ODATA Service and not BOPF so its's not applicable for me.

Anyone got a hint?

EDIT:

After a bit of trial and error I tried deleting the selected line, Result was that i was successful and the List Report was automatically refreshed, so the above named attribute in manifest.json seems not to take effect in my Model.

SAP Fiori for SAP ERP

entry.title: BTP application writing to on-premise HANA database table / Datasphere HANA database table
entry.content:
Hello,

We have some BTP developers creating an app that would write to an on-premise HANA database table (this database is used in for BW/4HANA).

We eventually want to migrate the BTP app to write to a Datasphere table. 

Is there a connection framework where we can easily switch the BTP app from writing to the on-premise HANA database table to writing to the Datasphere table?

Thanks.

Regards,

Mel Calucin

entry.title: SAP BAS CAPM debugging Uncaught Error Error: ENOSPC: System limit for number of file watchers reache
entry.content:
Hi All,

When I am trying to debug the CAPM application in BAS I am facing below issue
Uncaught Error Error: ENOSPC: System limit for number of file watchers reached, watch '/home/user/projects/pcoe-1/db.sqlite-shm'

Can anyone help me to resolve this issue?

Thank you.

SAP Business Application Studio  SAP Cloud Application Programming Model
